requirement_topic.zh: 电动自行车电池安全——EN 50604-1 / IEC 62133-2
requirement_topic.zht: 電動自行車電池安全——EN 50604-1 / IEC 62133-2

summary.en: The mandatory EU legal obligations for an EPAC battery are the Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC for the complete machine and the directly applicable Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 for batteries. EN 15194:2017 and EN 50604-1:2016 are voluntary harmonised/designated standards that may confer a presumption of conformity when correctly applied; they are not themselves mandatory law. EN 50604-1 covers cell and pack-level safety tests including overcharge, over-discharge, short circuit, temperature, shock, vibration, and crush. IEC 62133-2:2017 may be used as supporting evidence where appropriate. The Battery Regulation introduces staged obligations for LMT batteries, including labelling, due diligence, carbon footprint and battery-passport requirements.
summary.zh: EPAC电池在欧盟的强制性法律义务来自整机适用的机械指令2006/42/EC，以及直接适用的欧盟电池法规(EU) 2023/1542。EN 15194:2017和EN 50604-1:2016属于自愿采用的协调/指定标准；正确适用时可赋予合规推定，但标准本身并非强制性法律。EN 50604-1涵盖电芯及电池组层面的安全测试，包括过充、过放、短路、温度、冲击、振动及挤压测试。IEC 62133-2:2017可在适当情况下作为补充证据。电池法规对LMT电池分阶段引入标识、尽职调查、碳足迹及电池护照等要求。
summary.zht: EPAC電池在歐盟的強制性法律義務來自整機適用的機械指令2006/42/EC，以及直接適用的歐盟電池法規(EU) 2023/1542。EN 15194:2017和EN 50604-1:2016屬於自願採用的協調/指定標準；正確適用時可賦予合規推定，但標準本身並非強制性法律。EN 50604-1涵蓋電芯及電池組層面的安全測試，包括過充、過放、短路、溫度、衝擊、振動及擠壓測試。IEC 62133-2:2017可在適當情況下作為補充證據。電池法規對LMT電池分階段引入標識、盡職調查、碳足跡及電池護照等要求。

standards_or_laws: EN 50604-1:2016 — Secondary lithium batteries for light electric vehicle (LEV) applications — Safety requirements
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Safety requirements — Part 2: Lithium systems
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 — EU Battery Regulation (staged requirements from 2024–2027+)
EN 15194:2017 Clause 4.3 — Battery system requirements (references EN 50604-1)

gap.en: EU market access requires evidence that the battery and complete EPAC meet the applicable Machinery Directive and Battery Regulation obligations; applying EN 15194 and EN 50604-1 is a voluntary route to presumption of conformity, not a mandatory standard requirement. Practical gaps remain: (a) EN 50604-1 test conditions (temperature, charge rate, vibration profile) differ from GB/T 36972; (b) exporters should track Battery Regulation obligations for LMT batteries and maintain UN 38.3 transport documentation; (c) battery pack labelling must include required chemistry, capacity and manufacturer information in EU languages; (d) Battery Passport obligations for LMT batteries apply on the Regulation's staged timetable.
gap.zh: 欧盟市场准入要求证明电池及整车EPAC符合适用的机械指令和电池法规义务；采用EN 15194和EN 50604-1只是取得合规推定的自愿路径，并非强制性标准要求。实际差距仍包括：（a）EN 50604-1测试条件（温度、充电倍率、振动谱）与GB/T 36972不同；（b）出口商应跟踪LMT电池的电池法规义务并保存UN 38.3运输文件；（c）电池组标识须以欧盟语言包含所需的化学体系、容量及制造商信息；（d）LMT电池护照义务按法规的分阶段时间表适用。
gap.zht: 歐盟市場准入要求證明電池及整車EPAC符合適用的機械指令和電池法規義務；採用EN 15194和EN 50604-1只是取得合規推定的自願路徑，並非強制性標準要求。實際差距仍包括：（a）EN 50604-1測試條件（溫度、充電倍率、振動譜）與GB/T 36972不同；（b）出口商應跟蹤LMT電池的電池法規義務並保存UN 38.3運輸文件；（c）電池組標識須以歐盟語言包含所需的化學體系、容量及製造商信息；（d）LMT電池護照義務按法規的分階段時間表適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC for the complete EPAC and Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 for batteries; EN 15194:2017 / EN 50604-1:2016 are voluntary harmonised standards that may confer presumption of conformity

source.publisher: European Commission — Harmonised standards / Official Journal of the European Union

summary.en: China's primary e-bike battery standard is GB/T 36972-2018 (Lithium-ion batteries for electric bicycles), covering electrochemical performance and safety. Mandatory standard GB 42295-2023 (Electrical safety requirements for electric bicycles) and GB 42296-2023 (Electrical safety — Battery charger for electric bicycles) were introduced in 2023 and took effect from 2024. GB/T 36972 covers cell and pack tests similar to IEC 62133-2, but with different test parameters. CN certifications under these GB standards are not accepted as substitutes for EU EN 50604-1 or IEC 62133-2 compliance.
summary.zh: 中国电动自行车主要电池标准为GB/T 36972-2018（电动自行车用锂离子蓄电池），涵盖电化学性能及安全要求。强制性标准GB 42295-2023（电动自行车电气安全要求）及GB 42296-2023（电动自行车电气安全——充电器）已于2023年发布，并于2024年起正式实施。GB/T 36972涵盖与IEC 62133-2类似的电芯及电池组测试，但测试参数不同。依据上述GB标准取得的中国认证不被接受作为欧盟EN 50604-1或IEC 62133-2合规的替代。
summary.zht: 中國電動自行車主要電池標準為GB/T 36972-2018（電動自行車用鋰離子蓄電池），涵蓋電化學性能及安全要求。強制性標準GB 42295-2023（電動自行車電氣安全要求）及GB 42296-2023（電動自行車電氣安全——充電器）已於2023年發布，並於2024年起正式實施。GB/T 36972涵蓋與IEC 62133-2類似的電芯及電池組測試，但測試參數不同。依據上述GB標準取得的中國認證不被接受作為歐盟EN 50604-1或IEC 62133-2合規的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36972-2018 — Lithium-ion batteries for electric bicycles (SAMR, voluntary/referenced)
GB 42295-2023 — Electrical safety requirements for electric bicycles (SAMR, mandatory from 2024)
GB 42296-2023 — Electrical safety — Battery charger for electric bicycles (SAMR, mandatory from 2024)

requirement_topic.en: E-Bike Charger Safety — Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU
requirement_topic.zh: 电动自行车充电器安全——低压指令2014/35/EU
requirement_topic.zht: 電動自行車充電器安全——低壓指令2014/35/EU

summary.en: When the e-bike charger is supplied as a separate product (not integrated into the bicycle), it must comply with the Low Voltage Directive (LVD) 2014/35/EU as a standalone electrical product. EN 15194:2017 Clause 4.3.4 specifies charger safety requirements as part of the complete EPAC system. Relevant LVD harmonised standards for charger safety include IEC 60335-2-29 (Household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-29: Particular requirements for battery chargers) or IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, IT and communications — Safety requirements). CE marking and an EU Declaration of Conformity for the charger unit are required.
summary.zh: 当电动自行车充电器作为独立产品（非整车内置）供货时，须作为独立电气产品符合低压指令(LVD) 2014/35/EU的要求。EN 15194:2017第4.3.4条规定了整车EPAC系统中充电器的安全要求。充电器安全的相关LVD协调标准包括IEC 60335-2-29（家用及类似电器——第2-29部分：蓄电池充电器的特殊要求）或IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息技术及通信设备——安全要求）。充电器须取得CE标志并签发欧盟符合性声明。
summary.zht: 當電動自行車充電器作為獨立產品（非整車內置）供貨時，須作為獨立電氣產品符合低壓指令(LVD) 2014/35/EU的要求。EN 15194:2017第4.3.4條規定了整車EPAC系統中充電器的安全要求。充電器安全的相關LVD協調標準包括IEC 60335-2-29（家用及類似電器——第2-29部分：蓄電池充電器的特殊要求）或IEC 62368-1（音視頻、信息技術及通信設備——安全要求）。充電器須取得CE標誌並簽發歐盟符合性聲明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-29 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 2-29: Particular requirements for battery chargers
IEC 62368-1:2018 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety requirements

gap.en: If the charger is supplied separately, it requires its own CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU. Re-testing to IEC 60335-2-29 (or IEC 62368-1) at an EU-recognised lab is required. CN plug configuration: Chinese e-bike chargers typically use CN/GB 2099 plugs (Type C or I variants); EU markets require CEE 7/4 (Schuko) or CEE 7/16 (Europlug) — the plug/socket must be changed. Charger input range must also cover 230 V / 50 Hz (EU). UN 38.3 test documentation for the battery pack is needed for transport, separate from LVD charger testing.
gap.zh: 若充电器独立供货，须依据LVD 2014/35/EU单独取得CE标志。须在欧盟认可的实验室重新完成IEC 60335-2-29（或IEC 62368-1）检测。插头配置差异：中国电动自行车充电器通常使用CN/GB 2099插头（C型或I型变体）；欧盟市场要求CEE 7/4（Schuko型）或CEE 7/16（欧式插头）——须更换插头/插座。充电器输入范围还须涵盖230V/50Hz（欧盟标准）。电池组的UN 38.3运输测试文件在运输过程中为独立要求，与LVD充电器测试有所不同。
gap.zht: 若充電器獨立供貨，須依據LVD 2014/35/EU單獨取得CE標誌。須在歐盟認可的實驗室重新完成IEC 60335-2-29（或IEC 62368-1）檢測。插頭配置差異：中國電動自行車充電器通常使用CN/GB 2099插頭（C型或I型變體）；歐盟市場要求CEE 7/4（Schuko型）或CEE 7/16（歐式插頭）——須更換插頭/插座。充電器輸入範圍還須涵蓋230V/50Hz（歐盟標準）。電池組的UN 38.3運輸測試文件在運輸過程中為獨立要求，與LVD充電器測試有所不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU for standalone charger; EN 15194:2017 clause for integrated charger

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

summary.en: GB 42296-2023 (Electrical safety — Battery charger for electric bicycles) is China's mandatory charger safety standard, effective from 2024. It covers input/output protection, thermal runaway prevention, and enclosure ratings. Prior to GB 42296-2023, charger requirements were embedded in GB 17761-2018. Chinese charger certification under GB 42296 does not satisfy EU LVD requirements.
summary.zh: GB 42296-2023（电动自行车电气安全——充电器）是中国电动自行车充电器的强制性安全标准，自2024年起生效，涵盖输入/输出保护、热失控防护及防护等级要求。GB 42296-2023发布前，充电器要求包含在GB 17761-2018中。依据GB 42296取得的中国充电器认证不满足欧盟LVD要求。
summary.zht: GB 42296-2023（電動自行車電氣安全——充電器）是中國電動自行車充電器的強制性安全標準，自2024年起生效，涵蓋輸入/輸出保護、熱失控防護及防護等級要求。GB 42296-2023發布前，充電器要求包含在GB 17761-2018中。依據GB 42296取得的中國充電器認證不滿足歐盟LVD要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 42296-2023 — Electrical safety — Battery charger for electric bicycles (SAMR, mandatory from 2024)

requirement_topic.en: Battery Transport Safety — UN 38.3 (Lithium Cells & Batteries)
requirement_topic.zh: 电池运输安全——UN 38.3（锂电芯与锂电池）
requirement_topic.zht: 電池運輸安全——UN 38.3（鋰電芯與鋰電池）

summary.en: Lithium-ion battery packs used in e-bikes must pass UN 38.3 (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) transport testing before being shipped by air, sea, or road to the EU. UN 38.3 tests cover altitude simulation, thermal tests, vibration, shock, external short circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, and forced discharge. The test summary must be available on request from logistics operators and customs. This is a global IATA/IMDG requirement, not specific to the EU, but non-compliance blocks import into EU territory via regulated carriers.
summary.zh: 电动自行车锂离子电池组在空运、海运或陆运至欧盟前，须通过UN 38.3（联合国测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3条）运输测试。UN 38.3测试涵盖高度模拟、热测试、振动、冲击、外部短路、冲击/挤压、过充及强制放电。物流运营商及海关可要求提供测试摘要报告。这是全球IATA/IMDG的要求，非欧盟特有，但不合规将导致通过受管制承运商进入欧盟境内的货物被阻拦。
summary.zht: 電動自行車鋰離子電池組在空運、海運或陸運至歐盟前，須通過UN 38.3（聯合國測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3條）運輸測試。UN 38.3測試涵蓋高度模擬、熱測試、振動、衝擊、外部短路、衝擊/擠壓、過充及強制放電。物流運營商及海關可要求提供測試摘要報告。這是全球IATA/IMDG的要求，非歐盟特有，但不合規將導致通過受管制承運商進入歐盟境內的貨物被阻攔。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria — Part III Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — Lithium metal and lithium ion batteries
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — current edition (lithium battery shipping by air)
IMDG Code — current amendment (lithium battery shipping by sea)

gap.en: For e-bike batteries shipped from China to the EU: (a) UN 38.3 test summary must cover the exact battery model (capacity, cell count, BMS configuration) — generic reports are not accepted; (b) IATA PI 966/967/968 (lithium battery packed with/in equipment) packing instructions must be followed; (c) state of charge (SOC) must be ≤30% for air transport unless otherwise permitted; (d) the UN 38.3 report is model-specific — any design change to the battery pack requires re-testing. This is generally a documentation/logistics process gap rather than a technical gap, as CN labs are globally recognised for UN 38.3.
gap.zh: 电动自行车电池从中国运往欧盟时：（a）UN 38.3测试摘要须覆盖具体电池型号（容量、电芯数量、BMS配置）——通用报告不被接受；（b）须遵守IATA PI 966/967/968（随设备包装/装入设备的锂电池）包装说明；（c）空运时荷电状态（SOC）须≤30%，除非另有许可；（d）UN 38.3报告针对特定型号——电池组设计变更须重新测试。总体而言，这属于文件/物流流程差距，而非技术差距，因为中国实验室的UN 38.3测试在全球范围内获得认可。
gap.zht: 電動自行車電池從中國運往歐盟時：（a）UN 38.3測試摘要須覆蓋具體電池型號（容量、電芯數量、BMS配置）——通用報告不被接受；（b）須遵守IATA PI 966/967/968（隨設備包裝/裝入設備的鋰電池）包裝說明；（c）空運時荷電狀態（SOC）須≤30%，除非另有許可；（d）UN 38.3報告針對特定型號——電池組設計變更須重新測試。總體而言，這屬於文件/物流流程差距，而非技術差距，因為中國實驗室的UN 38.3測試在全球範圍內獲得認可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IATA/IMDG transport requirement; EU customs enforcement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CN customs export documentation requirement for lithium batteries

source.publisher: UNECE — United Nations Economic Commission for Europe

summary.en: China also requires UN 38.3 compliance for lithium battery transport under GB regulations and customs export rules. Chinese CNAS-accredited labs can issue UN 38.3 test summaries. UN 38.3 test reports from Chinese labs are generally accepted by IATA/IMDG as the standard is global, but the report must cover the specific battery model and configuration being shipped.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB法规及海关出口规定，同样要求锂电池运输符合UN 38.3。中国CNAS认可实验室可出具UN 38.3测试摘要报告。由于该标准具有全球通用性，中国实验室出具的UN 38.3测试报告通常被IATA/IMDG接受，但报告须覆盖所运输的具体电池型号及配置。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB法規及海關出口規定，同樣要求鋰電池運輸符合UN 38.3。中國CNAS認可實驗室可出具UN 38.3測試摘要報告。由於該標準具有全球通用性，中國實驗室出具的UN 38.3測試報告通常被IATA/IMDG接受，但報告須覆蓋所運輸的具體電池型號及配置。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (global standard, applied under CN customs export documentation requirements)
